name: encoding-artifacts
description: 25% of customer-support-bot traces contain HTML entities (&, <, ') and mojibake characters (Ã¤, Ã¶) in the input. User content is not being decoded properly before being passed to the agent.
projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.
- **doc-summarizer**: Summarizes uploaded documents. 2-3 LLM calls, varies by doc length. Normal latency: 5-15s.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$8
- Trace volume: ~300/day
- customer-support-bot: ~150/day
- email-classifier: ~100/day
- doc-summarizer: ~50/day

input.note: UTF-8 bytes interpreted as Latin-1, typical double-encoding issue

input.input_preview: User message: I can't find my order. I ordered on the 3rd & expected delivery by the 5th. The tracking page shows <no data>. Please help.
